violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth was found stored on the counter near the popcorn machine. Wet wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.

Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. Clean linens in mesh laundry bags were found with the bottom in contact with the floor. Clean linens should be protected from contamination.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Floor planks in the kitchen were found missing, not attached, and with large gaps. Also, flooring in front of popcorn machine has holes and is cracked. Flooring should be repaired so that it is a smooth, easily cleanable surface.
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
